name: argus-morning-scan
prompt:
Run your complete morning research scan now.

1. Load references/interests.yaml and any performance insights from the vault.
2. Scan all 5 signal lanes: AI tools, content performance, audience pain points, creator economy signals, and competitor intelligence.
3. Score every signal 1–5.
4. Apply the verification gate: if zero items scored 3+, send only '🔭 No signal today.' to Telegram and stop delivery.
5. If items scored 3+, deliver the full rich markdown table to Telegram via send_message.
6. Always write the full scan to Obsidian at wiki/synthesis/argus-scan-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
7. Write the content handoff to wiki/inbox/argus-handoff-{YYYY-MM-DD}.json for any items scoring 3+ with a strong content angle.
